title: Senior Plant Manager at Parle Products

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Parle Products
jsonLd.description:
Parle Products has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Parle Products:
Parle Products is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Parle Products!
